title: 50 Zlotys (Pope John Paul II)

obverse.description: Light blue and gold (color) print; black serial; Pope John Paul II dressed in papal vestments at right center, right hand raised in a gesture of greeting and left hand holding crosier, over world map.
obverse.lettering:
NARODOWY BANK POLSKI
PIĘĆDZIESIĄT ZŁOTYCH
JAN PAWEŁ II
16 X 1978 - 2 IV 2005
WARSZAWA
16 PAŹDZIERNIKA 2006 r.
PREZES
GŁÓWNY SKARBNIK
obverse.lettering_translation:
National Bank of Poland
Fifty Zlotys
John Paul II
16 X 1978 - 2 IV 2005
Warsaw
16th October 2006
CEO
Main Treasurer

reverse.description: Pope John Paul II seated at left, kissing the hand of the kneeling Cardinal Stefan Wyszynski. On the right, text from Pope John Paul II's Letter to the Poles with facsimile signature and rendering of Jasna Góra Monastery beneath.
reverse.lettering:
NARODOWY BANK POLSKI
„NIE BYŁOBY
NA STOLICY PIOTROWEJ
TEGO PAPIEŻA POLAKA
[…], GDYBY NIE BYŁO
TWOJEJ WIARY
NIE COFAJĄCEJ SIĘ
PRZED WIĘZIENIEM
I CIERPIENIEM,
TWOJEJ HEROICZNEJ
NADZIEI” …
Jan Paweł II
23 X 1978
TOTUS TUUS  SOLI DEO
PIĘĆDZIESIĄT ZŁOTYCH
BANKNOTY EMITOWANE PRZEZ NARODOWY BANK POLSKI SĄ PRAWNYM ŚRODKIEM PŁATNICZYM W POLSCE
A. HEIDRICH DEL. J. M. KOPECKI SC. PWPW S.A.
NBP
reverse.lettering_translation:
National Bank of Poland
„There wouldn’t be the in Holy See this Pope Pole if there wasn’t your faith not backing down from prison and suffering, your heroic hope”
John Paul II
23 X 1978
All Yours   to God Alone [Latin]
Fifty Zlotys
Banknotes issued by the National Bank of Poland are legal tender in Poland
A. HEIDRICH DEL. J. M. KOPECKI SC. PWPW S.A.
NBP

commemorated_topic: Anniversary of Karol Wojtyła's Election to the Papacy
comments:
The National Bank of Poland's public presentation of a collector note design depicting Pope John Paul II was held on Wednesday, 19 April 2006. This note was the first collector note in the history of Poland. The issue of the collector note was scheduled for 16 October 2006, the anniversary of Karol Wojtyła's election to the papacy.

The note was originally sold in a folder for 90 złotych.

A full list of this series of collectible banknotes is on the National Bank of Poland website:
https://nbp.pl/en/coins-and-banknotes/collector-banknotes/catalogue/
